vocab.example: As a bit of a horological enthusiast, I never leave the house without a mechanical timepiece on my wrist.

vocab.meaning: đỉnh cao của sự chế tác thủ công
vocab.example: I wear a watch because I appreciate it as the pinnacle of craftsmanship, rather than just a tool for telling time.

vocab.meaning: món đồ gia bảo (được truyền lại qua nhiều thế hệ)
vocab.example: I occasionally wear an heirloom piece that belonged to my grandfather, which holds immense sentimental value.

vocab.meaning: tích hợp một cách mượt mà/đồng bộ
vocab.example: My smartwatch seamlessly integrates with my other devices, allowing me to stay productive on the go.
Wearing a watch is purely a matter of habit for me; I feel somewhat incomplete without that slight weight on my arm.
